allow: Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.westmetall.com/en/markdaten.php?action=table&field=LME_Al_cash")

PowerShell(node --check api/get-news.js; node --check api/_lib/validate.js; node --check api/_lib/perplexity.js; node --check api/_prompts/femn.js; node --check api/_prompts/fesi.js; node --check api/_prompts/simn.js)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://commodity-news-topaz.vercel.app/api/get-news?tab=summary'; $r | Select-Object date, one_liner, _cached, _age_min, _data_date, _cached_at | Format-List; $r.risk_signals | ForEach-Object { "RISK: $\($_.risk\) | $\($_.affected\) | $\($_.probability\)"; "  why: $\($_.why\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://commodity-news-gintonic81-8805s-projects.vercel.app/api/get-news?tab=summary' -TimeoutSec 60; "date=$\($r.date\) cached=$\($r._cached\) age_min=$\($r._age_min\) data_date=$\($r._data_date\) cached_at=$\($r._cached_at\)"; if \($r._cached_at\) { "생성시각\(KST\): " + [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds\([long]$r._cached_at\).ToOffset\([TimeSpan]::FromHours\(9\)\).ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'\) }; "one_liner: $\($r.one_liner\)"; $r.risk_signals | ForEach-Object { ""; "RISK: $\($_.risk\) [$\($_.probability\)]"; "  affected: $\($_.affected\)"; "  why: $\($_.why\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=summary' -TimeoutSec 90; "cached=$\($r._cached\) age_min=$\($r._age_min\) data_date=$\($r._data_date\)"; if \($r._cached_at\) { "생성시각\(KST\): " + [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds\([long]$r._cached_at\).ToOffset\([TimeSpan]::FromHours\(9\)\).ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'\) }; "one_liner: $\($r.one_liner\)"; $r.risk_signals | ForEach-Object { ""; "RISK: $\($_.risk\) [$\($_.probability\)]"; "  affected: $\($_.affected\)"; "  why: $\($_.why\)"; "  impact: $\($_.impact\)" }; ""; "WEEK_AHEAD:"; $r.week_ahead | ForEach-Object { "- $\($_.variable\): $\($_.why\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=aluminum' -TimeoutSec 90; "SOURCES:"; $r._sources | ForEach-Object { "- [$\($_.date\)] $\($_.title\) | $\($_.url\)" }; ""; "KR_NEWS:"; $r._kr_news | ForEach-Object { "- [$\($_.date\)] $\($_.title\)" }; ""; "key_issues type: $\($r.lme.key_issues.GetType\(\).Name\) count: $\($r.lme.key_issues.Count\)")

PowerShell(node -e "import\('./api/_lib/macro-news.js'\).then\(async m => { const r = await m.fetchGlobalMacroNews\(\); console.log\('items:', r.items.length\); console.log\('analysis:', JSON.stringify\({score:r.analysis.score, fp:r.analysis.fingerprint, sources:r.analysis.distinctSources}, null, 1\)\); console.log\('trigger\(prev=null\):', m.isMacroTrigger\(r.analysis, null\)\); console.log\('trigger\(prev=iran:conflict\):', m.isMacroTrigger\(r.analysis, 'iran:conflict'\)\); r.analysis.evidence.forEach\(e => console.log\(' EV:', e.date, '|', e.source, '|', e.title\)\); }\)")

PowerShell(node -e "import\('./api/_lib/macro-news.js'\).then\(async m => { const r = await m.fetchGlobalMacroNews\(\); console.log\('analysis:', JSON.stringify\({score:r.analysis.score, fp:r.analysis.fingerprint, phases:r.analysis.phases, sources:r.analysis.distinctSources}\)\); console.log\('trigger\(prev=iran:conflict\):', m.isMacroTrigger\(r.analysis, 'iran:conflict'\)\); console.log\('trigger\(prev=same\):', m.isMacroTrigger\(r.analysis, r.analysis.fingerprint\)\); r.analysis.evidence.forEach\(e => console.log\(' EV:', e.date, '|', e.source, '|', e.title\)\); }\)")

PowerShell(node -e "import\('./api/_lib/tab-summary.js'\).then\(async m => { const ctx = await m.prefetch\(null\); const prevMock = { date: '2026-06-11', data: { risk_signals: [{ risk: '중동발 공급 차질', probability: 'MEDIUM', why: '이란 전쟁 확전 우려로 공급 리스크 지속' }], macro_event: null } }; ctx.prevSummary = prevMock; const p = m.buildPrompt\(ctx\); console.log\('--- 프롬프트 길이:', p.length\); console.log\(p.slice\(p.indexOf\('글로벌 와이어'\) - 50\)\); }\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(node -e "import\('./api/_lib/tab-summary.js'\).then\(async m => { const ctx = await m.prefetch\(null\); const p = m.buildPrompt\(ctx\); const i = p.indexOf\('글로벌 와이어 헤드라인 \(최근 24시간'\); require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('._tmp_prompt.txt', p.slice\(i - 5\), 'utf8'\); console.log\('written'\); }\)"; Get-Content ._tmp_prompt.txt -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -First 22)

PowerShell(node -e "process.env.CRON_SECRET='testsecret'; import\('./api/macro-sentinel.js'\).then\(async m => { const mkRes = \(\) => { const r = { code: null, body: null, status\(c\){ this.code = c; return this; }, json\(b\){ this.body = b; return this; } }; return r; }; const r1 = mkRes\(\); await m.default\({ headers: {}, query: {} }, r1\); console.log\('무인증:', r1.code\); const r2 = mkRes\(\); await m.default\({ headers: { authorization: 'Bearer testsecret' }, query: { dry: 'true' } }, r2\); console.log\('dry-run:', r2.code, JSON.stringify\(r2.body\)\); }\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.vercel\\auth.json", "$env:APPDATA\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\share\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { "$p : $\(Test-Path $p\)" }; npx vercel --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2)

PowerShell(npx vercel link --yes --scope gintonic81-8805s-projects --project commodity-news 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; npx vercel env pull .env.prod.tmp --environment=production --yes 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env.prod.tmp; $admin = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^ADMIN_SECRET=' }\) -replace '^ADMIN_SECRET=', '' -replace '"', ''; $cron = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^CRON_SECRET=' }\) -replace '^CRON_SECRET=', '' -replace '"', ''; "ADMIN_SECRET 존재: $\([bool]$admin\) / CRON_SECRET 존재: $\([bool]$cron\)"; if \($admin\) { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=summary&force=true&secret=$admin" -TimeoutSec 110; "갱신 완료 — macro_event 존재: $\([bool]$r.macro_event\)"; if \($r.macro_event\) { "headline: $\($r.macro_event.headline\)"; "what: $\($r.macro_event.what\)"; $r.macro_event.impacts | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.commodity\) [$\($_.direction\)] $\($_.mechanism\)" }; "watch: $\($r.macro_event.watch\)" }; "one_liner: $\($r.one_liner\)" })

PowerShell(\(Get-Content docs\\session-2026-03-27.md -TotalCount 8\); '---'; \(Get-Content docs\\session-2026-04-06.md -TotalCount 8\); '---'; git log --oneline --all -- .aider.chat.history.md | Select-Object -First 2)

Bash(curl -s --max-time 15 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.scrapmonster.com/scrap-prices/category/Aluminum-Scrap/116/1/1" -o /tmp/sm.html)

PowerShell(Get-Content .vercel/project.json; npx -y vercel env pull .env.vercel.prod --environment=production --yes 2>$null; echo "pull exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Select-String -Path .env.vercel.prod -Pattern '^ADMIN_SECRET=' -Quiet)

PowerShell($line = \(Select-String -Path .env.vercel.prod -Pattern '^ADMIN_SECRET='\).Line; $sec = \($line -replace '^ADMIN_SECRET=', ''\).Trim\('"'\); $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=ferroalloy&force=true&secret=$sec" -TimeoutSec 180; "cached: $\($r._cached\)"; "FeMn producers: $\(\($r.femn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)"; "SiMn producers: $\(\($r.simn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)"; "FeSi settle_usd: $\($r.fesi.futures.settle_usd\)"; "SiMn settle_usd: $\($r.simn.futures.settle_usd\)")

PowerShell($line = \(Select-String -Path .env.vercel.prod -Pattern '^ADMIN_SECRET='\).Line; $sec = \($line -replace '^ADMIN_SECRET=', ''\).Trim\('"'\); "secret length: $\($sec.Length\)"; $enc = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($sec\); $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=ferroalloy&force=true&secret=$enc" -TimeoutSec 180; "cached: $\($r._cached\)"; "FeMn producers: $\(\($r.femn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)"; "SiMn producers: $\(\($r.simn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)")

PowerShell($fa = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=ferroalloy" -TimeoutSec 60; "FeMn producers: $\(\($fa.femn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)"; "SiMn producers: $\(\($fa.simn.non_china_producers | ForEach-Object country\) -join ', '\)"; "FeSi settle: $\($fa.fesi.futures.settle\) / usd: $\($fa.fesi.futures.settle_usd\)"; "rate: $\($fa.exchange_rate_cny_usd\)"; $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=summary" -TimeoutSec 60; "one_liner: $\($s.one_liner\)"; "macro: $\($s.macro_event.headline\)"; $cnyHit = \($s | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\) -match 'CNY'; "summary에 CNY 포함: $cnyHit"; "signals:"; $s.key_signals | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.commodity\): $\($_.signal\)" })

PowerShell($fa = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=ferroalloy" -TimeoutSec 60; "cached: $\($fa._cached\) / age_min: $\($fa._age_min\) / data_date: $\($fa._data_date\) / fallback: $\($fa._fallback\)"; "updated_at: $\($fa.updated_at\)"; "femn carried_over: $\($fa.femn.carried_over\) / price_as_of: $\($fa.femn.price_as_of\)"; "femn context\(80\): $\($fa.femn.context.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $fa.femn.context.Length\)\)\)"; "femn korea_supply: $\($fa.femn.korea_supply\)")

PowerShell(node -e "Promise.all\([import\('./api/_prompts/femn.js'\), import\('./api/_prompts/simn.js'\), import\('./api/_prompts/summary.js'\)]\).then\(\([f,s,su]\) => { console.log\('femn:', f.getFemnPrompt\('2026-06-12'\).length\); console.log\('simn:', s.getSimnPrompt\('2026-06-12'\).length\); console.log\('summary:', su.getSummaryPrompt\('2026-06-12'\).length\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\) }\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $fa = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://news.a1kor.com/api/get-news?tab=ferroalloy" -TimeoutSec 120 } catch { "HTTP error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; $sw.Stop\(\); "elapsed: $\([int]$sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s"; "fallback: $\($fa._fallback\) / data_date: $\($fa._data_date\)")

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.scrapmonster.com/scrap-prices/category/Aluminum-Scrap/116/1/1" -o /tmp/scrap.html --max-time 25)
